# prime

Restore context. Re-read the kernel (`docs/process/kernel.md`) and
`docs/process/mandatory-rules.md` first — a break or compaction may have dropped
the always-on rules. Then read the product frame `PRODUCT.md`,
`docs/process/journal-state-plans.md`,
`.process-work/state/<branch-slug>.md`, the latest journal entry, and the active
plan. Name current state and the next concrete action.
